# Avatar

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/avatar`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/avatar/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-BSVgDXRR.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-avatar`
- `query-avatar-single`
- `query-avatar-list`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/videos/avatar/image2video`
- `/v1/videos/avatar/image2video/{id}`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Avatar",zh:"数字人"},endpoints:[{id:"create-avatar",method:"POST",path:"/v1/videos/avatar/image2video",title:{en:"Create Task",zh:"创建任务"},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authorization",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"image",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Avatar Reference Image",zh:"数字人参考图"},notes:[{en:"- Support inputting image Base64 encoding or image URL (ensure accessibility).",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"**Base64 Encoding Note:**\n Please note, if you use the Base64 method, make sure all image data parameters you pass are in Base64 encoding format. string.\n\n**Correct:**\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```\n\n**Incorrect:**\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"**Base64 编码说明：**\n请注意，若您使用base64的方式，请确保您传递的所有图像数据参数均采用Base64编码格式。使用 Base64 时，请不要添加任何前缀如 `data:image/png;base64,`，只需提供 Base64 编码字符串本身。\n\n**正确示例：**\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```\n\n**错误示例：**\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Supported image formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png",zh:"- 图片格式支持 .jpg / .jpeg / .png"},{en:"- Image file size ≤ 10MB, dimensions ≥ 300px, aspect ratio between 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸不小于 300px，图片宽高比介于 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1 之间"}]},{name:"audio_id",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Audio ID Generated via TTS API",zh:"通过试听接口生成的音频的 ID"},notes:[{en:"- Only supports audio generated within the last 30 days, duration between 2-300 seconds",zh:"- 仅支持使用 30 天内生成的、时长不短于 2 秒且不超过 300 秒的音频"},{en:"- Either `audio_id` or `sound_file` must be provided (mutually exclusive)",zh:"- `audio_id`、`sound_file` 编码或音频 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"- Accepted formats: .mp3/.wav/.m4a/.aac, max 5MB, format mismatch or file too large will return error codes and other information",zh:"- 音频文件支持 .mp3/.wav/.m4a/.aac，文件大小不超过 5MB，格式不匹配或文件过大会返回错误码等信息"},{en:"- Duration must be between 2-300 seconds",zh:"- 仅支持使用时长不短于 2 秒且不长于 300 秒的音频"},{en:"- Either `audio_id` or `sound_file` must be provided (mutually exclusive)",zh:"- `audio_id`、`sound_file` 参数二选一，不能同时为空，也不能同时有值"},{en:"- System will verify audio content and return error codes if there are problems",zh:"-
```
